title: Azure NetApp Files fundamentals
summary: Learn how to deploy, monitor, secure, and optimize Azure NetApp Files.

sections.title: Azure NetApp Files fundamentals
sections.summary: Learn how to deploy, monitor, secure, and optimize Azure NetApp Files.

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure NetApp Files
lessons.content_md:
Evaluate whether Microsoft Azure NetApp Files is appropriate for migrating and running your organization's file-based workloads.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-to-azure-netapp-files/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Understand how Azure NetApp Files provides volumes as a service
lessons.content_md:
Understand network attached storage (NAS) concepts and various NAS protocols supported in Azure NetApp Files.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-netapp-files-volumes-service/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Understand how Azure NetApp Files provides volumes as a service

lessons.title: Understand Azure NetApp Files essentials
lessons.content_md:
Learn about the key parts of Azure NetApp Files, including storage terminology and monitoring strategies, to help you optimize your setup and deployment processes.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-netapp-files-essentials/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Optimize costs with Azure NetApp Files
lessons.content_md:
This module looks at cost models and cost optimization features in Azure NetApp Files.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-netapp-files-cost-optimization/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Optimize costs with Azure NetApp Files

lessons.title: Understand quotas in Azure NetApp Files
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to manage and monitor capacity in Azure NetApp Files.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-netapp-files-quotas/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Understand quotas in Azure NetApp Files

lessons.title: Understand and tune Azure NetApp Files performance
lessons.content_md:
Learn about the different factors that influence performance in Azure NetApp Files and make choices to optimize the performance to meet the needs of your workloads.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-netapp-files-performance/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Understand and tune Azure NetApp Files performance

lessons.title: Using Azure NetApp Files application volume group
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use Azure NetApp Files application volume groups to optimize deployments with Oracle and SAP HANA.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-netapp-files-application-volume-group/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Using Azure NetApp Files application volume group

lessons.title: Understand data protection and resiliency in Azure NetApp Files
lessons.content_md:
This module teaches you about data protection options in Azure NetApp Files to help you improve the resiliency of your data.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-netapp-files-data-protection/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Understand data protection and resiliency in Azure NetApp Files

lessons.title: Solutions and benefits for using Azure NetApp Files
lessons.content_md:
Learn about applications for Azure NetApp Files with Linux OSS applications and databases, Windows applications and SQL Server solutions, SAP on Azure solutions, and other products.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-netapp-files-solutions-benefits/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Solutions and benefits for using Azure NetApp Files

lessons.title: Azure security for Azure NetApp Files
lessons.content_md:
Learn about data encryption options available in Azure NetApp Files to improve the security of your data.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-netapp-files-security/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Azure security for Azure NetApp Files

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Azure NetApp Files fundamentals
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Azure NetApp Files fundamentals**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
